sandbox_town_backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration.
sandbox_town_backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 is unsupported and may lead to runtime incompatibilities or lack of security updates.

sandbox_town_backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to target the new JDK baseline.
sandbox_town_backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 17 features and bytecode version; keeping it at 11 would prevent using Java 17-specific APIs or optimizations.
